arguments.title: AES Encryption Engine
arguments.description: Encrypts text using AES-256-CBC with a given key.

mcp.name: encrypt_aes
mcp.title: Encrypt Text with AES
mcp.description: Tool to securely encrypt a given text using Advanced Encryption Standard (AES) 256 CBC. Needs a 'clave' (password) and 'texto' (text to encrypt). Returns the encrypted text.

clave.description: The secret password or key used for encryption.
